# Vighnaharta Solutions

> Secure B2B portal for retailers and distributors in India to fetch government documents — Driving License, PAN, Aadhaar, Voter ID and Passport — as PDF, with wallet and commission management.

Vighnaharta Solutions is operated by Vighnaharta Group Limited from Aurangabad, Maharashtra. The platform serves administrators, distributors and retailers with role-based access, prepaid wallets, and document retrieval workflows.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, roles, and how the portal works.
- [About](/about): Company background and business details.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, address and support hours.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How user data is handled.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of use for the portal.
- [Refund Policy](/refund-policy): Refund timelines and conditions.
